title: olearia asterotricha subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Olearia asterotricha subsp. rotundifolia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known for its small, white daisy-like flowers and bushy growth habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the relief of various health issues. The health benefits associated with Olearia asterotricha subsp. rotundifolia include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
